params.deadline: Timestamp after which the transaction will revert
params.params: Parameters for the add liquidity and swap operation
params.wethIsEth: If true, incoming ETH will be wrapped to WETH and outgoing WETH will be unwrapped to ETH

returns.amountsIn: Array of amounts in for each token added to the pool, sorted in token registration order.

params.params: Parameters for the add liquidity and swap operation
params.sender: The sender passed to the operation. It can influence results (e.g., with user-dependent hooks)

returns.amountsIn: Array of amounts in for each token added to the pool, sorted in token registration order.

addLiquidityUnbalanced(address,uint256,b.notice: Adds liquidity to a pool with proportional token amounts and swap in the same transaction.

queryAddLiquidityUnbalanced(address,addr.notice: Queries an `addUnbalancedLiquidityViaSwap` operation without actually executing it.
